title: Revolve Group Full Year 2024 Earnings Summary
text: Revolve Group delivered strong full-year 2024 earnings, demonstrating consistent performance improvement throughout the year. Full-year 2024 revenue was $1.13 billion, up 5.7% from FY 2023, representing acceleration in growth momentum from the prior year. Net income of $49.6 million increased 76% from FY 2023, showcasing significant profitability improvements and operational leverage. Full-year 2024 earnings per share exceeded analyst expectations by 88.89%, with the company delivering $0.71 per share versus the estimate of $0.375 per share. The company demonstrated consistent quarterly performance, beating expectations in all four quarters of 2024. Operating improvements included margin expansion, lower fulfillment costs, and improved return rates. Cash generation remained strong, with the company maintaining a debt-free balance sheet and significant liquidity to fund growth initiatives including physical retail expansion and brand development. The strong 2024 results position Revolve well for continued growth in 2025, with management expecting further operational leverage and margin expansion as the company scales its brand investments and retail footprint.
